title: drosanthemum brevifolium
intro: Drosanthemum brevifolium, also known as the short-leaved daisy, is a plant species in the family Aizoaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Drosanthemum brevifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in folk medicine to address various health concerns.
